title: The Sacred Stash
description: Hoard 1,000 teas in the bank. Hydration is a lifestyle, not a choice.

title: The Forbidden Word
description: Convince Harry to say "Pregnant" in clan chat. No context provided.

title: Touched by the Gods
description: Receive a Mega Rare drop and immediately screenshot it before closing the chest in shock.

title: Betrayal in the Raid
description: PK a fellow TEA member mid-raid. Friendship is temporary, loot is eternal.

title: The Dying Art
description: Witness a clan member dying and write 'Pain.'

title: Clue Enjoyer
description: Get a 3rd age from a clue. Cry how it's not in the main game.

title: Patient Zero
description: Get two nerd logs during a League. Touch grass? Never heard of it.

title: The Infernal Teapot
description: Complete the Inferno with Tea as your only food.

title: The Sug Award
description: Finish last in a clan skill competition and post a paragraph of excuses in Discord.

title: The Nerder
description: Hit 200M XP in any skill. Nerd.
